characters.name: "Bubba" Joe Stewart
characters.description: "Bubba" Joe StewartCharacter informationGenderMaleBirthdayMay 6, 1938(deceased)RelationshipsChildrenRobby Ray Stewart(son)Bobby Ray Stewart(son)Earl Ray Stewart(son)GrandchildrenMiley Stewart(granddaughter)Jackson Rod Stewart(grandson)Luann Stewart(granddaughter)WifeRuthie Ray StewartIn-lawsSusan Stewart(daughter-in-law; deceased)Pearl Stewart(daughter-in-law) "Bubba" Joe StewartwasRuthie's husband andRobby's father. Very little is said about him except that he had large ears and that he and Ruthie started dating after a school dance. He is presumably deceased as the family refers to him in the past tense.

characters.name: Aaron
characters.description: AaronCharacter informationGenderMaleEye colorBrownHair colorBrownOccupationsStudentRelationshipsFriendsMiley StewartProduction informationPortrayed byNate HartleyFirst appearancePromma MiaLast appearanceI Am Mamaw, Hear Me Roar! Aaronis a character that appeared in the 14th episode ofthe third seasonofHannah Montana, titledPromma Mia. He is a geeky student who askedMileyto prom, and whom she almost stood up because she got a chance to record a duet withDavid Archuletaat the same time. He can also be seen standing in line to take a photo with Miley during their high school graduation, in the episodeI Am Mamaw, Hear Me Roar!

characters.name: Albert Dontzig
characters.description: Albert DontzigCharacter informationGenderMaleHeight6’1InterestsAnnoying the Stewart FamilyRelationshipsSistersDonna(twin sister)WifeUnnamed wifeNiecesPattyCousinsFrancesca (Cousin)NemesisRobby Ray StewartJackson StewartProduction informationPortrayed byVogt BrothersFirst appearanceMiley Get Your GumLast appearanceKilling Me Softly With His Height Albert Dontzig(has been played by bothPaul and Peter Vogt) is the Stewart's wealthy, heavyset, and obnoxious Malibu neighbor. He has formed ongoing feuds with both Robby Ray and Jackson, but curiously, never been seen interacting with Miley. He has a wife, a young niece named Patty (Savannah Stehlin), a (possibly twin) sister Donna (Peter Vogt), and a female cousin, Francesca (Lisa Rinna). The latter two both have crushes on former country music star Robby Ray "The Honkytonk Hearthrob," whom Dontzig knows is really his neighbor, Robby Ray Stewart. This implies that he should realize that Hannah Montana, the publicly acknowledged daughter of Robby Ray, is really Miley Stewart. The ramifications of this possible knowledge has not been explored.

characters.name: Alexa
characters.description: AlexaCharacter informationGenderFemaleOccupationsStudentProduction informationPortrayed byChristian SerratosFirst appearanceThe Idol Side of MeLast appearanceThe Idol Side of Me Alexais a character fromHannah Montana. She appears in the twenty-fourth episode ofthe first season, titled "The Idol Side of Me". Alexa is a girl who invitesAmberto her party, but Amber declines because she believes she’ll be accepted into a singing show to perform withHannah Montanathat night, even though she hasn’t received a reply yet. She ends the conversation by saying that she needs to look at herself in the mirror, making Alexa laugh.

characters.name: Aunt Dolly
characters.description: DollyCharacter informationGenderFemaleBirthdayFebruary 13, 1947OccupationsCountry singerRelationshipsChildrenMiley Stewart(goddaughter)HusbandPeteFriendsStewart Family,Lilly Truscott,Oliver OkenPetsRufus (dog)Production informationPortrayed byDolly PartonFirst appearanceGood Golly, Miss DollyLast appearanceKiss It All Goodbye Aunt Dolly(born February 13, 1947) is a native of Nashville, Tennessee, and lives there with her husband Pete (otherwise known to Miley as Uncle Petey which she's never seen him before but has talked to him by phone) and her dog, Rufus. Though it is unknown whether, like her actress Dolly Parton, she has a music career, Miley does see her as a go-to person for talking about her singing career, and she mentions to Mamaw that she thought Miley knew 'how to get a chuckle out of an audience from watching me on stage'. Aunt Dolly convinced Robby to have another go at persuading Miley's mom to go out with him when she turned him down, saying she was dating another boy, thus resulting in them getting together.

characters.name: Aunt Harriet
characters.description: Aunt HarrietCharacter informationGenderFemaleRelationshipsNephewsOliver OkenProduction informationPortrayed bySusan BergerFirst appearanceMiley Get Your GumLast appearanceMiley Get Your Gum Aunt Harrietis the aunt ofOliver Oken, and has only appeared in the episodeMiley Get Your Gum. She is responsible for Oliver's fear of chewing gum, because when Oliver was a baby, she was playing with Oliver while chewing a piece of gum, and the gum fell on Oliver, which triggered his fear. Aunt Harriet also gave Oliver a puppy sweater for Christmas that barks jingle bells. Just like how Robby Ray Stewart gave Miley a cat sweater sweater for her birthday that meows.

In the episode, he is publicly datingHannah Montana, although the two can't stand each other behind the scenes. Publicity people made them pretend that they like each other to sell their record.

characters.name: Becca Weller
characters.description: Becca WellerCharacter informationGenderFemaleHair colorBrownOccupationsStudentRelationshipsCrushOliver OkenProduction informationPortrayed byKirby Bliss BlantonFirst appearanceOops! I Meddled AgainLast appearanceOops! I Meddled Again Becca Welleris one of the students in Miley's school, and is a huge fan ofHannah Montana. Inside her locker are trinkets, posters, CDs, t-shirts, and other things related to/of Hannah Montana. She is known to have had a crush onOliver, and is his first girlfriend. She has only made one appearance in Hannah Montana and it is assumed they break up, because in later episodes,OliverdatesJoannie Palumbo, and thenLilly, who he is currently dating.

characters.name: Bobby Ray Stewart
characters.description: Bobby Ray StewartCharacter informationFull nameBobby Ray StewartGenderMaleBirthdayJuly 6, 1960Height6’1 ½OccupationsCowboyInterestsFarmingRobby Ray StewartRelationshipsMotherRuthie Ray StewartChildrenLuann Stewart(daughter)SistersSusan Stewart(sister-in-law); deceased)Aunt Pearl(sister-in-law)NiecesMiley Ray StewartNephewsJackson Rod StewartProduction informationPortrayed byBilly Ray CyrusFirst appearanceTorn Between Two HannahsLast appearanceTorn Between Two Hannahs Bobby Ray Stewart(played by Billy Ray Cyrus) is the identical brother ofRobby Ray Stewart, the younger brother ofUncle Earl, and the paternal uncle ofMileyandJacksonwhose cousinLuann Stewartis also identical to her and is Bobby Ray's daughter. He is only seen at the end of Torn Between Two Hannahs when Robby finds out about Luann locking Miley up in her (Hannah's) closet. He is seen to wear stereotypical cowboy clothes and hat and he has a strong Tennessee accent. At the end of Torn Between Two Hannahs,Mr. Dontzigcomes in when Bobby Ray and Robby Ray are talking and gets freaked out about it as he hates the Stewarts. According to Hannah Montana backstory, Bobby was born on July 6, 1960 and grew up in the fictional Bufford County, Tennessee. He has a large family with 8 brothers and sisters, including a twin brother named Robby Ray Stewart and a brother named Earl who is seen in the episode "(We're So Sorry) Uncle Earl", and often spoken of. His mother isRuthie Ray Stewart(Vikki Lawrence), known to Miley and Jackson as " Mamaw". He has a close relationship with Dolly Parton who isLuann's,Miley's, andJackson's godmother.

characters.name: Candace Montana
characters.description: Candace MontanaCharacter informationGenderFemaleRelationshipsChildrenHannah Montana(stepdaughter)Jackson Stewart(stepson)HusbandRobby Ray StewartProduction informationPortrayed bySara EriksonFirst appearanceWhen You Wish You Were the StarLast appearanceWhen You Wish You Were the Star  Candace Montanais, in a parallel universe, Robby's second wife.Mileymeets Candace in "When You Wish You Were the Star" after making a wish that she was Hannah all the time. Before marrying Robby, Candace had been Hannah's private tutor. Miley discovers that Candace doesn't really love Robby, but only married him for his money.

characters.name: Chelsea
characters.description: ChelseaCharacter informationGenderFemaleEye colorBlueHair colorBlondeProduction informationPortrayed byKelli GossFirst appearanceCome Fail AwayLast appearanceCome Fail Away Chelseais a character that appeared in the 26th episode ofthe third seasonofHannah Montana, titledCome Fail Away. In the episode, she went on a date withJackson. He bragged to her about how independent he was since he went going to college. Their date was interrupted byhis dad, who called him multiple times for not replacing the toilet paper. Chelsea was played by American actress Kelli Goss.

characters.name: Clarice Johnson
characters.description: Clarice JohnsonCharacter informationGenderFemaleRelationshipsHusbandEdward JohnsonProduction informationPortrayed bySheryl Lee RalphFirst appearanceWe're All on This Date TogetherLast appearanceWe're All on This Date Together Clarice JohnsonisRoxy's old high school rival. They reconnected before their high school reunion, and Roxy made up that she's married toRobby Rayto impress her. Clarice is extremely snobby and arrogant, making fun of people who stayed single and work regular jobs. Even her husband, Edward, made a comment that her behavior is the reason they don't have any friends.

characters.name: Colin Lasseter
characters.description: Colin LasseterCharacter informationGenderMaleOccupationsTelevision personalityProduction informationPortrayed byMichael KaganFirst appearanceSmells Like Teen SelloutLast appearanceKiss It All Goodbye Colin Lasseter(Michael Kagan) is a host of "The Real Deal" (a call-in television talkshow). He has a distinctive scraggly voice, is a devoted husband, and admittedly has "the bladder of a kitten". He is an avid supporter of the United People's Relief Fund Charity, which he promotes on his show, and serves as a host in many of their events. Despite her various antics on his show, Colin remains very fond of "America's Songbird" Hannah Montana. His seemingly innocuous questions often cause Miley to rethink her duplicitous actions as Hannah. It has been speculated that Lasseter may be based on Larry King. Colin Lasseter first interviews Hannah promoting her new perfume, O-Wow, which she secretly detests. As they uncomfortably discuss the topic of lying, Lasseter admits to profuse sweating when he does so, which a guilty Hannah promptly imitates ("Smells Like Teen Sellout"). He interviews both Hannah and newcomer Mikayla to publicize the United People's Relief Fund Florida benefit concert. Because of his frequent bathroom breaks, he apparently doesn't pick up on the pair's off-camera bickering animosity ("I Want You to Want Me... to Go to Florida"). Colin is a chair referee for a UPRF celebrity pro am tennis tournment doubles match (featuring Hannah Montana and Guillermo Montoya against Dakota Fanning and Andy Roddick) which is interrupted by an erupting feud between Lola Luftnagle and Mike Standley III in the stands. ("Everybody Was Best Friend Fighting"). While hosting a telethon for the UPRF, he once again misses the catty sparring of adjacent telephone volunteers, Hannah and Mikayla. ("That's What Friends Are For?"). After Hannah Montana and her current "boyfriend" Austin Rain sing their duet, "Us Isn't Us Without You", on "The Real Deal", she promptly confesses that the romance is a publicity stunt to sell records. Colin admits to being "horrified" by her revelation ("Cheat It"). He does not seem to like Miley as much as he loved Hannah ("Kiss It All Goodbye").

Despite her various antics on his show, Colin remains very fond of "America's Songbird" Hannah Montana. His seemingly innocuous questions often cause Miley to rethink her duplicitous actions as Hannah. It has been speculated that Lasseter may be based on Larry King. Colin Lasseter first interviews Hannah promoting her new perfume, O-Wow, which she secretly detests. As they uncomfortably discuss the topic of lying, Lasseter admits to profuse sweating when he does so, which a guilty Hannah promptly imitates ("Smells Like Teen Sellout"). He interviews both Hannah and newcomer Mikayla to publicize the United People's Relief Fund Florida benefit concert. Because of his frequent bathroom breaks, he apparently doesn't pick up on the pair's off-camera bickering animosity ("I Want You to Want Me... to Go to Florida"). Colin is a chair referee for a UPRF celebrity pro am tennis tournment doubles match (featuring Hannah Montana and Guillermo Montoya against Dakota Fanning and Andy Roddick) which is interrupted by an erupting feud between Lola Luftnagle and Mike Standley III in the stands. ("Everybody Was Best Friend Fighting"). While hosting a telethon for the UPRF, he once again misses the catty sparring of adjacent telephone volunteers, Hannah and Mikayla. ("That's What Friends Are For?"). After Hannah Montana and her current "boyfriend" Austin Rain sing their duet, "Us Isn't Us Without You", on "The Real Deal", she promptly confesses that the romance is a publicity stunt to sell records. Colin admits to being "horrified" by her revelation ("Cheat It"). He does not seem to like Miley as much as he loved Hannah ("Kiss It All Goodbye").

characters.name: Connor
characters.description: ConnorCharacter informationGenderMaleOccupationsMall elfProduction informationPortrayed byRyan Pinkston Connoris a character fromHannah Montana. He appears in the fifth episode ofthe third season, titled "Killing Me Softly With His Height".

characters.name: Cooper
characters.description: Cooper MontgomeryCharacter informationNicknamesCoopGenderMaleAge group15-16Eye colorBrownHair colorBlackOccupationsEmployee at a Movie TheaterStudentRelationshipsSistersOlivia(younger sister)FriendsJackson StewartProduction informationPortrayed byAndre KinneyFirst appearanceShe's a Super SneakLast appearanceMoney for Nothing, Guilt for Free Cooper Montgomery, also calledCoop, is Jackson's best friend who appears in season one. The two are often seen hanging out together. Cooper has not made an appearance outside of season one, although he is mentioned and it's assumed they still hang out. Cooper often plays the straight man to Jackson's antics. He works at a movie theater called "Nick's Fat City." He enjoys Shirley Temple cocktails, calling them "fruity and refreshing." He also has a secret love of baking; something he keeps secret because he believes it is a primarily female activity. Cooper has a little sister namedOlivia(Rae'Ven Larrymore Kelly) who is a student on the East Coast. In "I Can't Make You Love Hannah if You Don't," Olivia visits Malibu on break where she meets Jackson. She agrees to go out with Jackson before he learns she is Cooper's sister. The incident causes a temporary rift in Jackson and Cooper's friendship. They are good friends again after Cooper realizes that everything was Olivia's fault.
